claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript offers a binding in the environment for a constant value, allowing efficient reuse of a value such as PI across multiple function calls (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.49-61).
The const keyword introduces one or more bindings in the block that encloses it, enabling a constant value to be accessed without invoking a new function (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.49-61).
The const keyword introduces one or more bindings in the block that encloses it, ensuring that a name is bound as close to its use as possible (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.49-61).

source_record_text: Summary of const keyword usage in the That Constant Coffee Craving chapter.
